qa_scores_gpt54.notes: Playable with movement, jumping, ladders, barrels, lives, level clear and restart, but barrel logic is inconsistent, broken ladders are nonfunctional, pause freezes input progression only partially, and visuals are a simplified approximation rather than a close Donkey Kong recreation.

qa_scores_gemini.notes: A very solid recreation with working ladders, barrel physics, and hammer mechanics, though the platforms are flat rectangles rather than the iconic slanted girders.

qa_scores_opus.notes: Core mechanics of moving, jumping, climbing ladders, barrel dodging, and level completion are implemented, but platforms lack the iconic slope, barrel AI is simplistic with edge-case bugs, collision/scoring logic has issues, and the visual representation is very basic with flat rectangles rather than resembling the original arcade game.

qa_scores_gpt54.notes: The source is syntactically incomplete/truncated at the end, so the game will not run despite some decent-looking Donkey Kong-inspired rendering and input logic being present earlier in the file.

qa_scores_gemini.notes: A highly competent recreation with working ladders, sloped platform physics, barrel jumping logic, and even hammer power-ups.

qa_scores_opus.notes: Code is truncated mid-initialization, has double game loops (step overwritten after RAF), platform slopes are all same direction instead of alternating, barrel physics and ladder transitions are buggy, and the level complete detection triggers repeatedly without proper state guarding.
